name: 54"x84" Light Filtering Stitched Edge Curtain Panel Cream - Threshold™: Modern Indoor Rod Pocket
description:
Let in a lot or a little light with the 84"x54" Stitched Edge Light Filtering Curtain Panel from Threshold™. This curtain panel is designed to filter and soften the sun's natural light to bathe any room in a warm glow. It features a rod pocket to make hanging a breeze, a back tab to help you create a clean, tailored look, and its cream color blends effortlessly with other decor. Best of all, the curtain panel can be machine washed with like colors for easy cleaning when it needs a quick refresh.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
